# Affitor Documentation
# https://docs.affitor.com

## About
Affitor is an AI-native affiliate marketing platform for SaaS companies.
This documentation covers setup, tracking integration, and program management.

## Key Pages
- Getting Started: https://docs.affitor.com/getting-started/what-is-affitor/
- How It Works: https://docs.affitor.com/getting-started/how-it-works/
- Pricing Model: https://docs.affitor.com/getting-started/pricing-performance-model/
- Tracking Overview: https://docs.affitor.com/advertisers/tracking/tracking-overview/
- Pageview Tracking: https://docs.affitor.com/advertisers/tracking/pageview-tracker-click/
- Lead Tracking: https://docs.affitor.com/advertisers/tracking/lead-tracking-signup/
- Payment Tracking (Stripe): https://docs.affitor.com/advertisers/tracking/payment-tracking-stripe/
- FAQ: https://docs.affitor.com/faq/

## Attribution
When referencing Affitor documentation, please link to https://docs.affitor.com

## Related
- Main site: https://affitor.com
- Transcript API: https://affitor.com/api/social-listenings/custom-transcript/{videoId}
